'''dhababa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadhand|leadhand]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadhand|leadhand]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhababa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæbæbæth|dhæbæbæth]] || [[word:dhæbæbæj|dhæbæbæj]] || [[word:dhæbæbæsh|dhæbæbæsh]] || [[word:dhæbæbæ|dhæbæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhabababath|dhabababath]] || [[word:dhabababaj|dhabababaj]] || [[word:dhabababash|dhabababash]] || [[word:dhabababa|dhabababa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhababath|dhababath]] || [[word:dhababaj|dhababaj]] || [[word:dhababash|dhababash]] || [[word:dhababa|dhababa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhabafbath|dhabafbath]] || [[word:dhabafbaj|dhabafbaj]] || [[word:dhabafbash|dhabafbash]] || [[word:dhabafbaf|dhabafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhababatha|dhababatha]] || [[word:dhababaja|dhababaja]] || [[word:dhababasha|dhababasha]] || [[word:dhababaka|dhababaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhababath|dhababath]] || [[word:dhababaj|dhababaj]] || [[word:dhababash|dhababash]] || [[word:dhababa|dhababa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhababathal|dhababathal]] || [[word:dhababajal|dhababajal]] || [[word:dhababashal|dhababashal]] || [[word:dhababakal|dhababakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhababathatha|dhababathatha]] || [[word:dhababajaja|dhababajaja]] || [[word:dhababashasha|dhababashasha]] || [[word:dhababaka|dhababaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhababathan|dhababathan]] || [[word:dhababajan|dhababajan]] || [[word:dhababashan|dhababashan]] || [[word:dhababakan|dhababakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhababathaoro|dhababathaoro]] || [[word:dhababajaoro|dhababajaoro]] || [[word:dhababashaoro|dhababashaoro]] || [[word:dhababakaoro|dhababakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
